designs.title: irregular web 12
designs.intent: Klee #8: 12 random points, dense complete-graph web, hand-drawn lines — the living antithesis of R8's clean corner mesh.

designs.title: irregular web 15
designs.intent: Denser irregular web — more points, more complexity, still asymmetric.

designs.title: irregular web 9 open
designs.intent: Fewer points, more negative space — an open irregular web (test the sparse end).

designs.title: irregular web 18 dense
designs.intent: High count, dense wandering web — complexity + hand (watch paper-rip on plot).

designs.title: perimeter web jittered
designs.intent: Architectural-honest: 14 perimeter points, but lines hand-drawn so the mesh never reads crisp.

designs.title: perimeter web wild
designs.intent: Same architecture, wilder hand — heavy jitter dissolves the boundary polygon into living lines.

designs.title: grid dissolved
designs.intent: Klee #14 straight-vs-curve: a 4x4 grid of points, but heavy jitter melts the rigid lattice into an organic net.

designs.title: grid dissolved fine
designs.intent: 5x5 grid dissolved — denser organic net from a regular seed.

designs.title: architectural anchors, hand-drawn
designs.intent: The DIRECT organic redo of R8's dud: corners+midpoints+centre, but lines are living/not-straight.

designs.title: anchors + scatter
designs.intent: Architectural anchors PLUS a random scatter (two layers) — structure meets irregularity.

designs.title: off-centre web
designs.intent: Klee #8 equilibrium: an irregular web pushed off-centre, balanced by open space.

designs.title: two clusters
designs.intent: R30 multi-mass win: two irregular webs of comparable weight with open space between.

designs.title: three clusters
designs.intent: Three irregular webs in an asymmetric knot — a constellation of connected point-fields.

designs.title: big + satellite web
designs.intent: One dominant irregular web + a smaller satellite web (asymmetric weights, balanced).

designs.title: dense irregular 20
designs.intent: Maximal complexity: 20 random points, moderate hand — a rich living network filling the wall.

designs.title: raw hand web
designs.intent: The rawest hand (high jitter) on a mid web — lines wander freely, nothing crisp.
